AI Recruitment Agency Software 2026 — CV Screening, CRM & WhatsApp Automation | MIRAC Technologies

  • ✓ Fixed-price contract
  • ✓ NDA signed on first call
  • ✓ Full IP transfer on delivery
  • ✓ 12-month support SLA
  • ✓ Senior engineers only
  • ✓ 0 missed deadlines in 24 months
We take on a limited number of projects per quarter.
3 spots available for Q3 2026.
Join 30+ companies across 8 countries who trust MIRAC with their critical systems
Home | Contact Us | Related Industry Software | Related Industry Software | Related Industry Software

Recruitment agencies face an overwhelming volume of applications, slow screening processes, and fragmented communication across emails, phone calls, and messaging apps. Identifying top talent quickly is critical to satisfying clients and closing placements. MIRAC Technologies has engineered an AI-Powered Recruitment Agency Software tailored to the needs of agencies in the UK, Canada, UAE, and Australia. Our platform fundamentally transforms the hiring process by introducing advanced AI CV screening. The system automatically parses, analyzes, and ranks hundreds of resumes against specific job requirements in seconds, significantly reducing manual effort and eliminating human bias. This intelligent automation ensures that recruiters spend their time engaging with the best candidates rather than sifting through unqualified applications. The software includes a comprehensive Candidate CRM that tracks every interaction, manages the interview pipeline, and automates interview scheduling. Additionally, it features seamless WhatsApp integration, enabling automated candidate outreach, appointment reminders, and instant follow-ups on the candidate's preferred

platform. A dedicated client portal allows employers to review shortlisted profiles, provide feedback, and track the progress of their vacancies in real-time. By streamlining workflows and accelerating the placement cycle, MIRAC's recruitment software empowers agencies to improve their service delivery, reduce time-to-hire, and significantly increase their operational profitability. Our platform fundamentally transforms the hiring process by introducing advanced AI CV screening. The system automatically parses, analyzes, and ranks hundreds of resumes against specific job requirements in seconds, significantly reducing manual effort and eliminating human bias. This intelligent automation ensures that recruiters spend their time engaging with the best candidates rather than sifting through unqualified applications. The software includes a comprehensive Candidate CRM that tracks every interaction, manages the interview

pipeline, and automates interview scheduling. Additionally, it features seamless WhatsApp integration, enabling automated candidate outreach, appointment reminders, and instant follow-ups on the candidate's preferred platform. A dedicated client portal allows employers to review shortlisted profiles, provide feedback, and track the progress of their vacancies in real-time. By streamlining workflows and accelerating the placement cycle, MIRAC's recruitment software empowers agencies to improve their service delivery, reduce time-to-hire, and significantly increase their operational profitability.

Why Recruitment Agencies Are Losing to Automation

Manual processes are slowing down placements...

How AI CV Screening Works

Detailed explanation of our AI parsing technology...

The Cost of Manual Recruitment

Consultant screens 50 CVs/day × 4 hrs × $30/hr = $120/day just in screening costs.
